mentions.surface: de Siliano negotio
hodie me ex Sicca arbitror omnia cogniturum
Cottae quod negas te nosse
ultra Silianam villam est
si perficitur de hortis Sili
nihil est scilicet quod de Cottae cogitemus
As to the Silius business
I expect to learn everything today from Sicca
The Cotta place, which you say you do not know
lies beyond Silius' villa
But if the Silius gardens come through
there is plainly nothing to think about as regards Cotta's place
de Cicerone ut scribis ita faciam
ex Aledio quod scribas si quid inveneris scribes
About my son, I shall do as you say
If you have learned anything from Aledius worth writing about
de Bruto tamen, si quid habebis
sciri enim iam puto ubi Pansam exspectet
valde enim urbem fugio multas ob causas
Piliae, Atticae salutem
Piliae, Atticae salutem
On Brutus, however --- if you have anything
where he is waiting for Pansa
for many reasons I am very much avoiding the city
My greetings to Pilia and Attica
My greetings to Pilia and Attica
